violations.description: FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Ice cream mix basin/resovior noted with a cold holding temperature above 41 degrees fahrenheit. Vanilla and Chocolate mix both noted at 55?F. The critical violation re-inspection will occur on or before 9-25-25 unless the Inspector is contacted to delay re-inspection.The unit will either need to be repaired or phyiscally removed from service to correct the violation.
